prompt: Packages entered by suppliers in non-centimeter units show impossible cubic volume and appear in the wrong oversized-handling queue. Packages entered in centimeters still look correct. Every submitted unit is already present in the supported length-unit table.

repo_files.sql/package_volume.sql:
SELECT
    p.package_id,
    p.length_value * p.width_value * p.height_value AS volume_cm3
FROM shipping_package AS p
WHERE p.package_id = :package_id;
repo_files.sql/oversize_queue.sql:
SELECT
    p.package_id
FROM shipping_package AS p
WHERE max(p.length_value, p.width_value, p.height_value) >= :limit_cm
ORDER BY p.package_id;
